name: projects/10033276352334490527/screens/bf2ea580c91b4e188a253456abe2e542
title: A plain, minimalist 16-bit SNES-style pixel art background for a sports HUD. The composition is clean and understated, featuring a dark charcoal and navy blue subtle gradient or a very simple geometric pattern. High-quality 8-bit aesthetic with sharp edges, no complex illustrations of stadiums or crowds—just a professional, retro-themed digital canvas for a data-dense interface. Low saturation, dark theme.
